reference: Hello Doctor, can you tell me why I feel dizzy or disoriented when my brain expects something to happen but it does not? For example, if I try to click somewhere on my computer but it freezes before I notice, causing the click to be ineffective, I feel disoriented and dizzy. It jolts my vision and makes my head pound for a couple of minutes. This happens quite often, usually when I am not fully paying attention. I am twenty-six years old and male. I have had this problem for as long as I can remember. Currently, I am taking thyroxine for Hashimoto's disease.
text: Hello, doctor. Do you tell me why I feel dizzy or disoriented when my brain expects something to happen but it does not? For example, if I try to click somewhere on my computer but it freezes before I notice, causing the click to be ineffective, I feel disoriented and dizzy. It chills my vision and makes my head pound for a couple of minutes. This happens quite often, usually when I am not fully paying attention. I am 26 years old and male. I have had this problem for as long as I can remember. Currently, I am taking thyroxine for Hashimoto's disease.
